name: GOLFTEC Minnetonka
about: GOLFTEC Minnetonka is a technology-driven golf training facility that provides data-based instruction and club fitting services. It utilizes advanced systems like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback and personalized coaching. The studio is designed for serious golfers looking for objective, measurable improvements to their game, offering a structured learning environment with PGA-certified coaches.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven lessons using advanced motion measurement technology
Personalized coaching plans for individual improvement goals
Professional club fitting services with launch monitors for optimized performance
High-tech training bays for effective and structured practice

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor used for club fitting and lessons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rent/borrow them from GOLFTEC. Club rentals are available to ensure you have the proper equipment for your lesson or fitting session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Bringing outside food or drinks is not mentioned as an option. The focus is on the golf instruction and training experience.

faq.question: How long is an 18-hole simulator session?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole simulator session is not specified, as GOLFTEC primarily focuses on skill-based lessons and practice rather than on-course simulation.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, indicating a degree of kid-friendliness. However, the primary environment is a serious training studio rather than a family entertainment center.
